name: Herring Salad with Sour Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Sauce: Blend thoroughly sour cream, yogurt, lemon juice and sugar.
Salad: Peel onions and cut into thin slices. Peel and quarter apples, removing cores and cutting into thin wedges. Mix the sliced onions and apples with the sauce. Arrange herring and apple-onion mixture in layers in a dish. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 5 hours. Sprinkle with dill before serving.
